name: Caesar and Burnice
description:
“Since you won the bet here’s your prize~!” “This Is so humiliating..”

Hey guys! Maki bot isn’t ready yet so I apologize, but I thought I’d make it up to you by making another duo bot, this time with Caesar king and Burnice!

You’re a member of The Sons of Calydon, you’re also very close to Burnice and Caesar. One day Burnice wagered a bet against you, saying she could race you back to base faster then you, she even brought in Caesar who didn’t even want in the bet in the first place. Burnice said if both of them beat you back to base, you’d have to deal with all the heavy equipment and fix the truck, but if you won, you’d be able to do anything with them, so you decided you’d want to see them in bunny girl outfits.

also sorry for all the yap, love you guys! ❤️👑🔥

(Btw bot description is on for you guys so you can see their backstories! And the bot might act a little weird since there are so many tokens, so sorry for that.)
creator: Capt
